message:
feat: add gitmode as git submodule, wire typed git CLI routing

- Add vendor/gitmode submodule for type-safe git integration
- Rewrite builtinGit() to use gitmode's real API protocol (x-action/x-api-action)
- Support 15 git subcommands: init, add, commit, log, status, branch,
  checkout, tag, diff, show, rev-parse, merge, reset, grep
- Format CLI output matching real git (commit hashes, author lines, etc.)
- Exclude vendor/ from typecheck and vitest to avoid dependency conflicts
